note: Seed symbols to validate the schema. Full content pipeline fills this in later phases. Effects vocabulary: add, multiply, addPerAdjacent, destroy, transform, spawn. Every synergy references a tag or an id.

symbols.name: Gemstone
symbols.devNotes: Baseline treasure filler (anchors EV). Name matched to available CC0 art (Kenney Tiny Dungeon gem); id kept stable.

symbols.name: Barn Hen
symbols.devNotes: Cheap animal that pecks adjacent food (self-buff). Name matched to available CC0 art (Kenney Tiny Farm hen); id kept stable. Mechanics unchanged.

symbols.name: Wheat Sheaf

synergies.note: +1 for each animal on the board.

spawnRules.note: Occasionally propagates another sheaf into the shared pool.

symbols.devNotes: Food backbone; light spawner. CC0 art: Kenney Tiny Farm wheat sack. Mechanics unchanged.

symbols.name: Prospector

synergies.note: Pays ×2 while any mineral is on the board.

symbols.devNotes: Scaler that pays double when it shares the board with a mineral. Multiply resolves after adds (self-buff model).

symbols.name: Raw Ore
symbols.devNotes: Mineral payload for Prospector. A future 'smelter' symbol will add a transform raw-ore -> silver-ingot once that id exists; the validator would reject the dangling target until then (see test/fixtures/invalid-symbols.json).
